strengths: 15+ years of full-stack experience across web, mobile, and embedded systems
Strong TDD/craftsmanship background with recent TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB work
Hands-on AI agent infrastructure experience (MCP code generators, agentic workflows) at current role
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in resume
Kotlin not listed; Java experience appears dated (robotic arms work circa 2016-2018)
Primary stack alignment partially inferred — Vitest and PostgreSQL not explicitly cited

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP tooling experience
Missing Nest.js and current Kotlin experience

response.justification: Candidate substantially exceeds the 6+ years requirement with deep full-stack credentials, recent TypeScript/Node/React/MongoDB work at Optilyz, and directly relevant AI-agent and MCP tooling experience at re:cinq. Engineering discipline (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) and architecture exposure are strong. Gaps around explicit Nest.js and current Kotlin are real but learnable for a senior of this caliber, and the AI-agent experience is a standout match for the role.
